suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the `python-library-worker` procedure or its transcript-audit expectations so required `.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/library/environment.md` reads are explicitly visible before a worker reports `followedProcedure: true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The pass review for `fix-batch-lookup-guard` found that `.factory/skills/python-library-worker/SKILL.md` requires reading those library files, but the recorded transcript skeleton for worker session `8e0297c3-c88a-4450-920b-d7248eef9c3d` only showed an `LS` of `.factory/library` before implementation while the handoff still reported `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pre-commit formatting is required by `AGENTS.md` and `python-library-worker`, but `.factory/services.yaml` does not expose a formatter/pre-commit command.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: services.yaml commands are static strings, so adding a fixed formatter entry would not faithfully capture the required per-change `pre-commit run --files <changed-files>` workflow without choosing an overly broad default.
